REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-22-2002 - OFF CALENDAR, NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. REQUEST FOR JURY TRIAL STRICKEN. COMMISSIONER LORETTA M. NORRIS; P. DIAS, CLERK, RHONDA FUNG, REPORTER.

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-26-2002 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON AUG-26-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER LORETTA M. NORRIS; P. DIAS, CLERK; RHONDA FUNG, REPORTER.

JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER BELDON YEE. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON AUG-26-2002 AT 9:35 AM IN DEPT. 624, ANNE E. BOULIANE. NO APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT, SENT FOR PROVE-UP.
MINUTES FOR AUG-26-2002 9:35 AM FOR DEPT 624

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON AUG-26-2002 IN DEPT. 624 - APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PROVE-UP HEARING PROCEEDED. WITNESS SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. HAVING HEARD THE EVIDENCE, THE COURT ORDERED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. TO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANTHONY MARKS, THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES SITUATED AT 34 SIXTH ST., #533, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. IT WAS FURTHER ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE SUM OF $1,950.00 BACK RENT, $398.98 UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES FOR A TOTAL SUM OF $2,348.98, $99.00 COSTS AND $15.33 PER DIEM HOLDOVER. LEASE FORFEITED. EXHIBIT ORDERED RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF COUNSEL IN OPEN COURT. JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE BOULIANE; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: D. LUBIN, #3234 (624)
WITNESS LIST FILED
PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBIT LIST FILED

Off Calendar Aug-22-2002 Continued To Aug-26-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-26-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Plaintiff appearing by and through counsel, Arnold Walter Evje, Esq., and there being no appearance by the defendant, the court orders the request for jury trial of defendant stricken. Trial date is confirmed.
